case_title: WRIGHT, RANDALL J. VS GUTIERREZ, SANDRA C/O PHILIPP SCHREIER TRUST

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,554.00 FILED BY WRIGHT, RANDALL J. AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, SANDRA C/O PHILIPP SCHREIER TRUST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO SANDRA GUTIERREZ RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, RANDALL J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, SANDRA C/O PHILIPP SCHREIER TRUST PLTF UNABLE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF REGARDING DEFT'S NEGLIGENCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
